stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 8168, PANS-OPS, Transition Altitudes shall be...

options.a: published in aeronautical information publications, and shown on the appropriate charts.
options.b: published in aeronautical information publications, shown on the appropriate charts, and included in ATIS broadcasts.
options.c: published in aeronautical information publications, and included in ATIS broadcasts.
options.d: shown on the appropriate charts, and included in ATIS broadcasts.
